name: sphere-plugin
description: Fragment Intelligence and authoring for agent-readable content, plus read-only tools for your own Sphere Node.
long_description: Sphere is a local Claude desktop extension. Four local tools validate fragments, analyze readiness, generate reports, and scaffold new fragments from your files, with zero configuration and no network access. Three read-only client tools query the owner face of a Sphere Node you run yourself, using a URL and token you provide. The plugin hosts nothing and stores nothing.

tools.name: validate_fragment
tools.description: Check a fragment's structural validity against the Sphere fragment schema.

tools.name: analyze_fragment_readiness
tools.description: Report advisory readiness gaps that are not hard errors, with severities and suggestions.

tools.name: generate_fragment_report
tools.description: Combine validation and readiness into one readable report for a fragment or a directory.

tools.name: prepare_fragment
tools.description: Scaffold and write a new fragment (sphere.json + content.md) from provided fields.

tools.name: get_publisher_summary
tools.description: Read-only: GET /owner/summary from your configured Sphere Node.

tools.name: get_fragment_usage
tools.description: Read-only: GET /owner/fragments/{id}/usage from your configured Sphere Node.

tools.name: get_payment_status
tools.description: Read-only: GET /owner/payments from your configured Sphere Node.

sphere_node_url.title: Sphere Node URL
sphere_node_url.description: Base URL of your own Sphere Node, for example https://node.example.com. Optional: leave blank to use only the local fragment tools.

sphere_node_token.title: Sphere Node Token
sphere_node_token.description: Owner bearer token for your Sphere Node. Stored in your OS keychain. Optional: leave blank to use only the local fragment tools.
